required_inputs: request scope and intended production coordination action
lane scope, adjacent authority map, and owner hierarchy
tenant legal, editorial, creative, procurement, finance, producer, rights, account, media, delivery, contractual, and final approval rules
refusal_triggers: request asks for legal, editorial, creative direction, procurement, finance, producer-of-record, rights, media strategy, contractual, platform-policy override, or final client approval authority
request asks the lane to book, produce, edit, QA, upload, traffic, or otherwise execute underlying production work
request asks the lane to hand off or close work without required owner, artifact, approval, confidentiality, rights, schedule, delivery, or retention evidence

required_inputs: agency production, engagement, SOW, ad-materials, production-spec, confidentiality, rights, claims, disclosure, and delivery context
refusal_triggers: required engagement, SOW, production, channel, confidentiality, rights, claim, disclosure, ad-spec, or authority source context is missing
public source, tenant policy, client instruction, SOW, MSA, NDA, rights restriction, vendor rule, publisher rule, platform rule, or production requirement materially conflicts
source freshness no longer supports a confident production coordination result

required_inputs: client, brand, campaign, project, job, asset, version, review round, owner, due date, and system identifiers
brief, SOW, estimate guardrail, production calendar, job jacket, vendor scope, proofing, review, approval, legal, editorial, rights, QA, delivery, communication, and closeout records
refusal_triggers: brief, SOW, job jacket, production spec, owner map, review, approver decision, legal or editorial clearance, rights, QA, delivery, communication, proof, or retention evidence is incomplete or unverifiable
source records conflict across project, CRM, ticketing, document, DAM, proofing, approval, vendor, finance, delivery, communication, or retention systems
requested handoff or closure is not supported by traceable source evidence

required_inputs: account, creative, production, producer, vendor, legal, editorial, rights, quality, media, delivery, client, and retention owner map
required_outputs: blocker summary with missing systems or records
refusal_triggers: required system of record is unavailable
prior owner, next owner, approval owner, reviewer, recipient, channel, rights owner, production owner, vendor owner, or delivery owner is unknown
project, CRM, ticketing, document, DAM, proofing, approval, vendor, finance, legal, delivery, communication, rights, or retention source path cannot be retrieved

required_inputs: authority, source-conflict, confidentiality, rights, approval, schedule, delivery, contractual, and client-impact indicators
refusal_triggers: critical tenant fact, client identity, engagement scope, SOW, handoff rule, approval rule, confidentiality rule, rights rule, authority source, or system record is unknown
conflicting public guidance, tenant policy, SOW terms, MSA terms, NDA terms, agency policy, vendor requirement, platform rule, or client instruction remains unresolved
required owner acceptance or approval evidence is missing for the requested handoff or closure

required_outputs: handoff package with owner and missing dependencies
refusal_triggers: request is outside production dependency intake, owner routing, blocker tracking, handoff packaging, confidentiality-aware routing, or closure confirmation

request requires legal, editorial, creative, procurement, finance, producer, quality, delivery, privacy, rights, media strategy, account, contractual, platform-policy override, or final client approval authority
request requires professional judgment, production execution, or contractual signoff instead of evidence-backed coordination
dependency map cannot be established
handoff artifact set is incomplete
systems materially disagree on owner, state, schedule, version, or acceptance evidence
prior owner is unknown
destination owner or acceptance proof is absent
required production records, approvals, rights, confidentiality, schedule, delivery, or retention artifacts are missing
closure criteria are not met
destination owner acceptance is missing
ownership, schedule, rights, confidentiality, approval, vendor, delivery, or system blockers remain unresolved

required_inputs: client engagement scope and confidentiality records
client-file, agency-work-product, pitch-work, vendor-bid, talent-material, substantiation-file, audience-data, performance-data, platform-credential, and approved-channel requirements
client commitments, delivery obligations, due dates, rights constraints, and approval constraints
refusal_triggers: request would disclose or reuse client files, agency work product, pitch work, vendor bids, talent material, substantiation files, audience data, platform credentials, unreleased creative, or performance data without approved scope
requested recipient, channel, purpose, portfolio use, showcase use, or reuse is not approved
client commitment, SOW, MSA, NDA, rights rule, delivery obligation, or agency policy conflicts with legal, privacy, confidentiality, approval, or client-rights rules

required_inputs: requested professional, legal, editorial, creative, financial, procurement, production, rights, media, policy, or contractual action
legal, editorial, privacy, delivery, account, finance, media strategy, production, procurement, rights, creative direction, and client approver map
engagement, SOW, MSA, IO, NDA, vendor, rights, policy, platform, and approval boundaries
refusal_triggers: request requires legal interpretation, claim substantiation, disclosure approval, editorial approval, creative direction, privacy-law interpretation, media strategy, budget approval, procurement approval, vendor award, production commitment, usage-rights interpretation, change-order approval, platform-policy override, final acceptance, or contractual signoff
request changes client commitments, SOW obligations, IO obligations, account terms, delivery obligations, production obligations, vendor obligations, rights obligations, or financial exposure
client rights, usage rights, regulated content, professional judgment, production authority, or final approval authority determine the answer
